overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a spacesuit with red accents exploring a dimly lit industrial facility or space station interior. The character moves along metal grating floors past large equipment and cable runs, heading toward a distant illuminated doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance corridor with cable runs

agents.ego_description: character in red-accented spacesuit walking along the industrial wall beside large equipment and floor cables

entered.detail: tall black industrial equipment rack with metallic panels
thick bundled cables running along the metal floor
metal plate flooring with visible grid pattern
doorway with green illumination visible at the end of the corridor
industrial ceiling light casting focused illumination

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow industrial corridor, hugging the left wall beside a large black equipment unit. Thick cables run across the metal grating floor, and dim overhead lights illuminate the path toward a distant green-lit doorway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial corridor leading to illuminated airlock

events.description: moves from narrow equipment-lined passage into wider open corridor

agents.ego_description: character moving through the open corridor toward the distant illuminated doorway, away from the wall equipment

entered.detail: industrial crates and storage containers stacked against the right wall
large machinery units visible in the open area ahead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a more open industrial area, leaving the tight corridor behind. The space widens to reveal stacked containers on the right and additional machinery ahead, while the illuminated doorway remains visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a cramped industrial corridor that gradually opens into a wider machinery bay. It begins with the character hugging the left wall beside a large black equipment unit, moving across a metal grating floor crisscrossed by thick cables. As the character advances toward a distant green-lit doorway, the narrow walls begin to recede. The scene then expands into a more open industrial area, leaving the tight corridor behind to reveal stacked containers on the right and additional machinery ahead. The camera continues its forward trajectory, maintaining focus on the illuminated doorway as the environment shifts from a confined passage to a spacious facility.
